instructions: Melt butter in a pot over medium heat. Add zucchini, chicken broth, salt, and curry powder to the pot; cook until the zucchini is soft, about 15 minutes.
Pour soup into a blender no more than half full. Cover and hold lid in place; pulse a few times before leaving on to blend. Puree in batches until smooth.

zucchini-spaghetti-recipe-comedera.name: Zucchini Spaghetti Recipe

ingredients.item: Pimiento en polvo (picante o no picante)

instructions: Comenzaremos por lavar muy bien el calabacín y retirarle los dos extremos. Yo recomiendo no pelarlo para conservar la parte de esta verdura que tiene más sabor, aparte de más fibra y muchos nutrientes.

Luego, convertiremos el calabacín en fideos con ayuda de un espiralizador, una mandolina, rallador, pelador o cuchillo (para contar el tiempo de esta receta de cocina, hemos considerado que se utiliza un espiralizador o mandolina).

Una vez obtenidos los espaguetis de calabacín, los reservaremos momentáneamente y nos encargaremos del ajo. Pelaremos el diente y los picaremos lo más finamente posible. Si hemos decidido utilizar los tomates cherry, los lavaremos bien y los picaremos en mitades.

Enseguida, conseguiremos una sartén antiadherente y calentaremos un chorrito de aceite en ella. Una vez caliente, sofreiremos el ajo durante tres minutos. Pasado este tiempo, agregaremos los espaguetis y los saltearemos durante cinco minutos más. Vamos a remover constantemente, para mezclar con el ajo, pero de manera delicada para no dañar estos frágiles fideos. También salpimentaremos y agregaremos un toque de polvo de pimiento (si te gusta el picante, puedes utilizar polvo de guindillas o en caso contrario, usa polvo de Espelette vasco, o nada).
Retira los zoodles de la sartén y sirve inmediatamente, regando con un puñado de queso parmesano rallado (opcional)y adornando con los jitomates cherry (también opcionales).

zucchini-stir-fry.name: Zucchini Stir Fry

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Heat oil and garlic in a large skillet or wok over medium heat. Cook and stir onion in hot oil-garlic mixture until onion is almost translucent, about 3 to 5 minutes. Add zucchini; cook and stir until zucchini is slightly crisp, but not mushy, about 8 to 10 minutes.
Stir in diced tomatoes and cook until heated through. Stir in Italian seasoning, salt, and pepper.

zucchini-stuffed-in-the-oven-argiro.name: Zucchini Stuffed In The Oven
instructions: Σε ένα μπολ βάζουμε τον ανθότυρο, τη φέτα, το μισό κεφαλοτύρι, το σκόρδο, τη φρυγανιά, το μαϊντανό και το δυόσμο, το καρύδι και τα ντοματίνια.
Τρίβουμε μπόλικο πιπέρι κι ανακατεύουμε καλά. Το αφήνουμε στην άκρη.

zucchini-stuffed-with-couscous-a-healthy.name: Zucchini Stuffed With Couscous: A Healthy And Recipe
zucchini-stuffed-with-couscous-a-healthy.original_name: Calabacines rellenos de cuscús: una receta saludable y fácil

ingredients.item: 1 cda  de aceite de oliva  (virgen extra)
1 taza de caldo de verduras caliente
3 cdas de queso feta desmenuzado o queso vegano rallado

instructions: Lava los calabacines y córtalos por la mitad longitudinalmente. Con una cuchara pequeña, vacía con cuidado la pulpa dejando un borde de aproximadamente 1 cm. Reserva parte de la pulpa para el relleno. Coloca los calabacines en una bandeja para horno, pincélalos con aceite de oliva, y salpimienta al gusto.
Precalienta el horno a 180°C y hornea las mitades de calabacín durante 15 minutos para que se ablanden ligeramente sin perder firmeza.
En un bol, coloca el cuscús y vierte sobre él el caldo de verduras caliente. Tapa con un paño limpio y deja reposar 5 minutos. Luego, airea con un tenedor para soltar los granos.

En una sartén grande, calienta una cucharada de aceite de oliva. Sofríe la cebolla y el ajo hasta que estén transparentes. Agrega la pulpa de calabacín picada, el pimiento, la zanahoria y el tomate. Cocina durante 6-8 minutos hasta que los vegetales estén tiernos.
Añade al salteado el cuscús hidratado, las pasas, las almendras, las especias (comino, cúrcuma), el jugo de limón, la menta y el perejil. Mezcla bien y ajusta sal y pimienta al gusto.

Rellena generosamente las mitades de calabacín con la mezcla de cuscús. Si deseas, espolvorea queso feta por encima. Hornea durante 10-12 minutos adicionales, o hasta que el queso esté dorado y los calabacines completamente cocidos.
Sirve los calabacines rellenos calientes para disfutar.

zucchini-stuffed-with-eggnog-argiro.name: Zucchini Stuffed With Eggnog
instructions: Προτιμάμε χοντρά η στρογγυλά κολοκύθια γιατί είναι ιδανικά για γέμισμα.
Αφού τα πλύνουμε, αφαιρούμε το κοτσάνι και λίγο από το πίσω μέρος για να στέκονται στην κατσαρόλα.
Αφαιρούμε μία φέτα από πάνω που θα τη χρησιμοποιήσουμε σαν καπάκι.
Με το εργαλείο που αδειάζουμε τα κολοκυθάκια ή με το κουταλάκι αφαιρούμε το εσωτερικό τους και το ψιλοκόβουμε.

zucchini-stuffed-with-fish-a-healthy-del.name: Zucchini Stuffed With Fish: A Healthy Delight
zucchini-stuffed-with-fish-a-healthy-del.original_name: Calabacines rellenos de pescado: una delicia saludable

ingredients.item: 300 gr  de filete de pescado blanco  ((merluza, tilapia o lenguado))
100 gr de queso rallado ((opcional, tipo parmesano o mozzarella))
1/2 taza de puré de tomate natural

instructions: Lava y corta los calabacines a lo largo.
Vacía la pulpa con una cuchara, dejando un borde de 1 cm. Reserva la pulpa para el relleno.
Cuece los calabacines al vapor durante 5-7 minutos hasta que estén tiernos pero firmes.
En una sartén, calienta el aceite de oliva. Sofríe la cebolla y el ajo hasta que estén translúcidos.
Añade la zanahoria rallada y la pulpa de los calabacines picada. Cocina por 3-4 minutos.
Incorpora el pescado desmenuzado, cocina hasta que esté bien cocido.
Añade el puré de tomate, sal, y pimienta. Mezcla bien y cocina por 2 minutos más.
Coloca los calabacines en una bandeja para horno.
Rellena cada mitad con la mezcla de pescado.
Espolvorea pan rallado y queso rallado por encima.
Precalienta el horno a 200 °C (204°C).
Hornea los calabacines durante 15-20 minutos, hasta que estén dorados por encima.
Decora con perejil fresco picado y sirve caliente.

zucchini-stuffed-with-meat-recipe-comede.name: Zucchini Stuffed With Meat, Recipe
zucchini-stuffed-with-meat-recipe-comede.original_name: Calabacines rellenos con carne, receta casera

ingredients.item: 300 gr de carne picada (si es de cerdo, mejor)

instructions: Pica los por la mitad calabacines a lo largo.
Con un cuchillo haz varios cortes profundos en cada mitad del calabacín tal como se ve en la foto. Haz cortes a lo largo y a lo ancho.
Procura que el cuchillo no penetre hasta el fondo porque podría romper los calabacines.
Una vez hecho los cortes, con la ayuda de un tenedor, quítale el relleno a cada una de las mitades de calabacín, de nuevo guíate por lo que muestro en la foto de arriba.
Lo ideal es que le quites aproximadamente 2/3 de la “carne” de la verdura.
Una vez listo, reserva este relleno.
Pica la media cebolla, el tomate, el pimiento y el ajo en cubos pequeños. Igualmente coje la carne de los calabacines y pícala del mismo tamaño que los demás ingredientes.
Calienta una sartén con aceite de oliva y fríe el ajo, la cebolla el pimiento, el tomate y el calabacín.
Agrega la carne de cerdo picada y mezcla todo bien.
Échale un poco de orégano, comino, sal y pimienta.
Deja que se cocine unos minutos. Si este guiso está muy seco, échale ½ vaso de agua.
Baja el fuego y deja que se cocine durante unos 20 minutos.
Revisa la sal y agrégale más si es necesario. Debes estar atento a que no se seque mucho esta cocción. Pero ojo, tampoco es que vas a hacer una sopa.
Mientras esperas a que esté lista la carne, mete las mitades de los calabacines al horno a 180 grados durante 10 minutos para que se cocinen un poco.
Luego de estos 10 minutos, saca los calabacines pero deja el horno encendido.

En lo que esté listo el estofado, puedes empezar a armar cada calabacín relleno: simplemente con una cuchara ve echando la carne picada sobre cada mitad de calabacín, luego pon un poco de queso blanco rallado y encima espolvorea queso parmesano.
Pon los calabacines al horno nuevamente, esta vez a 200 grados, en la misma bandeja que usaste previamente.
Deja que se cocinen hasta que se hayan dorado por encima tal como se ve en la foto.

zucchini-stuffed-with-quinoa-a-very-vers.name: Zucchini Stuffed With Quinoa: A Very Versatile Recipe
zucchini-stuffed-with-quinoa-a-very-vers.original_name: Calabacines rellenos de quinoa: una receta muy versátil

ingredients.item: 1/2 taza de queso feta o queso rallado ((opcional))

instructions: Lava los calabacines y córtalos a lo largo por la mitad. Con la ayuda de una cuchara, retira la pulpa con cuidado, dejando un borde grueso para que las mitades mantengan su forma. Reserva la pulpa.

Enjuaga la quinoa bajo agua fría y ponla a cocer en una cacerola con las 2 tazas de agua o caldo de verduras. Cocina a fuego medio durante unos 15 minutos o hasta que esté suave y el agua se haya absorbido completamente. Reserva.

En una sartén, calienta el aceite de oliva y sofríe la cebolla y el ajo durante unos 3-4 minutos hasta que estén dorados. Agrega el pimiento, la zanahoria y la pulpa de los calabacines picada. Cocina todo por unos 5 minutos más hasta que las verduras estén tiernas.

Añade la quinoa cocida a las verduras salteadas, mezclando bien. Incorpora el perejil, el comino, el pimentón, sal y pimienta al gusto. Si decides usar queso feta, agrégalo también en este momento para un toque cremoso.

Coloca las mitades de los calabacines en una bandeja para hornear. Rellénalos con la mezcla de quinoa y verduras. Si lo deseas, puedes cubrirlos con un poco de salsa de tomate y queso rallado para gratinar.
Precalienta el horno a 180°C (177°C) y hornea los calabacines durante 25-30 minutos, hasta que estén tiernos y el queso, si lo usas, esté dorado.

zucchini-stuffed-with-rice-teleculinaria.name: Zucchini Stuffed With Rice
instructions: Coloque a couve num tabuleiro, polvilhe com o açúcar e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 120ºC, durante 1 hora e 30 minutos.
Coza o arroz em água abundante temperada com sal, por cerca de 15 minutos. Escorra e reserve.
Corte as curgetes ao meio, no sentido do comprimento, e escave-lhes ligeiramente o interior. Tempere com sal, pimenta e um fio do azeite e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºC, durante 8 minutos.
Descasque e pique a cebola, bem como o pimento (limpo de sementes), e refogue-os no restante azeite. Junte os cogumelos laminados e deixe cozinhar por mais 10 minutos.

Tempere o preparado anterior com sal, pimenta e o alecrim, adicione o arroz cozido e envolva tudo. Recheie as curgetes com este preparado e sirva com o caldo-verde desidratado e queijo parmesão ralado.

zucchini-stuffed-with-shrimp-and-chicken.name: Zucchini Stuffed With Shrimp And Chicken Baked With Bechamel
zucchini-stuffed-with-shrimp-and-chicken.original_name: Calabacines rellenos de gambas y pollo al horno con bechamel

ingredients.item: 300 g de gambas grandes o langostinos

instructions: Lavamos los calabacines, despuntamos y si queréis podéis quitar unas tiras de piel a lo largo, esto es sólo decorativo. Con una cucharilla o sacabolas sacamos la pulpa de calabacín, con cuidado de dejar un poco de fondo, para que nos sirva de base. Reservamos ambas cosas.

En una sartén con un poco de aceite de oliva virgen extra pochamos la cebolla picada finamente. Cuando comience a dorarse, incorporamos el calabacín muy picado, salteamos, y añadimos el pollo en trozos pequeños.
Una vez que el pollo está cocinado, añadimos la harina y cocinamos durante un par de minutos. Agregamos la leche poco a poco, mientras mezclamos
Por último, añadimos las gambas o langostinos pelados y troceados, salpimentamos.
Con esta mezcla rellenamos los calabacines, espolvoreamos con queso rallado y si queréis, podéis adornar con un langostino entero.
Horneamos unos 20-25 minutos a 180º C.

zucchini-stuffed-with-tuna-pequerecetas.name: Zucchini Stuffed With Tuna

ingredients.item: 2 latas de atún en agua, escurrido

instructions: Precalienta el horno a 180°C (177°C). Corta los calabacines por la mitad a lo largo y retira la pulpa con cuidado, dejando un borde de aproximadamente 1 cm. Pica la pulpa y resérvala.
En una sartén grande, calienta el aceite de oliva a fuego medio. Agrega la cebolla, el ajo, el tomate, el pimiento y la zanahoria rallada, y cocina hasta que estén tiernos.
Agrega la pulpa de calabacín picada y el atún escurrido a la sartén. Cocina por unos minutos más y sazona con sal y pimienta al gusto.

Rellena las mitades de calabacín con la mezcla de atún y verduras. Coloca los calabacines rellenos en una bandeja para horno. Espolvorea queso rallado por encima. Hornea en el horno precalentado durante unos 20-25 minutos, o hasta que los calabacines estén tiernos y el queso esté dorado.
Sirve caliente y disfruta de estos deliciosos calabacines rellenos de atún como plato principal o acompañamiento.

zucchini-stuffed-with-turkey-step-by-ste.name: Zucchini Stuffed With Turkey Step By Step
zucchini-stuffed-with-turkey-step-by-ste.original_name: Calabacines rellenos de pavo paso a paso
instructions: Primero cortamos longitudinalmente a la mitad los calabacines.
Les damos unos cortes a lo largo y a lo ancho sin llegar a cortarlos del todo, y les echamos un poco de sal y un chorrito de aceite de oliva.
Los metemos en el horno durante 15 minutos a 180ºC con temperatura en la parte superior del horno.
Una vez hechos, nos ayudamos de una cuchara para separar la pulpa del calabacín y reservamos.
Para preparar la bechamel ponemos una cucharada de aceite junto con una nuez de mantequilla en una sartén.
Cuando la mantequilla esté derretida añadimos las 2 cucharadas de harina rehogamos.
Vamos añadiendo poco a poco la leche sin dejar de remover hasta que espese. Le añadimos una pizca de nuez moscada y sal. Reservamos.
Echamos en una sartén un chorro de aceite de oliva, le añadimos un ajo picado y una cebolla picada.
Lo rehogamos todo.
Pelamos el tomate y lo cortamos en dados para añadirlo a la sartén; le añadimos una pizca de sal y otra de azúcar. Lo dejamos hacer a fuego lento durante 20 minutos.
En otra sartén pochamos la otra cebolla picada, el pimiento verde en trozos pequeños y el otro diente de ajo.
Cuando las verduras estén pochadas añadimos la carne picada de pavo junto con la de los calabacines previamente cortada en pequeños trozos y la dejamos al fuego 5 minutos.
Cogemos los calabacines vacíos y los rellenamos, poniendo primero la carne picada y después una capa de tomate; repetimos con otra de carne y finalmente otra de bechamel.
Espolvoreamos con queso para fundir y gratinamos en el horno hasta que se funda el queso y quede dorado.
Servimos y acompañamos con lo que quieras pero que sea un poco de queso parmesano.

zucchini-stuffing-bake.name: Zucchini Stuffing Bake

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Bring 1/2 cup of lightly salted water to a boil. Add zucchini and onion and cook uncovered until crisp-tender, about 5 minutes. Drain in a colander and transfer to a bowl.
Stir soup and sour cream into zucchini and onions. Season with salt and pepper.
Combine stuffing mix with butter in a small bowl; stir well.
Layer half of the stuffing mix into the bottom of a 9x13-inch baking dish. Spoon the zucchini mixture on top. Sprinkle with half of the Cheddar cheese.
Add the rest of the stuffing mix, then the remaining cheese. Cover baking dish with aluminum foil.
Bake in the preheated oven until bubbly, about 30 minutes. Uncover and bake until cheese has melted and browned, about 15 minutes.

zucchini-summer-tart-recipe-lezzet.name: Zucchini Summer Tart Recipe
zucchini-summer-tart-recipe-lezzet.original_name: Ev Usulü Kabaklı Yaz Tartı Tarifi

ingredients.item: 2 adet orta boy kabak (rendelenmiş ve suyunu sıkılmış)
1/2 su bardağı lor peyniri veya beyaz peynir
Tuz, karabiber, isteğe bağlı kuru otlar (nane, dereotu)
Normal un yerine tam buğday unu veya yulaf unu kullanabilirsiniz.
Glutensiz tart için badem unu, hindistan cevizi unu veya glutensiz un karışımları kullanılabilir.
Tereyağı yerine margarin veya zeytinyağı kullanılabilir.
Vegan bir seçenek için hindistan cevizi yağı tercih edilebilir.
Beyaz şeker yerine esmer şeker veya agave şurubu kullanılabilir.
Daha hafif bir tat için miktarı azaltabilirsiniz.
Yumurtayı chia tohumu + su karışımı (1 yemek kaşığı chia + 3 yemek kaşığı su) ile veya ezilmiş muz ile değiştirebilirsiniz.
Kabak yerine havuç, balkabağ�� veya kabak-karışımı kullanabilirsiniz.
Daha yoğun tat için kabak ve havucu karıştırabilirsiniz.
Lor yerine ricotta, labne veya vegan peynir alternatifleri kullanılabilir.
Daha yoğun bir tat için krem peynir tercih edilebilir.
Mısır unu yerine tam buğday unu veya yulaf unu kullanılabilir.
Daha bağlayıcı bir hamur için biraz rendelenmiş ekmek içi eklenebilir.
Tuz ve karabiber dışında taze veya kuru nane, dereotu, fesleğen veya kekik ekleyebilirsiniz.
Farklı aromalar için biraz muskat rendesi veya kırmızı biber de eklenebilir.

instructions: 1. Tereyağı ve pudra şekerini krema kıvamına gelene kadar çırpın.
2.  Yumurtayı ekleyip karıştırın.
3.  Un ve tuzu ekleyerek yumuşak bir hamur yoğurun.
4.  Hamuru streç filme sarıp 30 dakika buzdolabında dinlendirin.
5. Rendelenmiş kabak ve havucun suyunu iyice sıkın.
6.  Lor peyniri, mısır unu, yumurta, tuz, karabiber ve isteğe bağlı otları ekleyip karıştırın.
7. Hamuru unlanmış tezgahta açın ve tart kalıbına yerleştirin.
8.  Kenarlarını hafifçe bastırın.
9. Hazırladığınız kabaklı karışımı hamurun üzerine dökün ve düzleştirin.
10. Önceden ısıtılmış 180°C fırında 35-40 dakika pişirin.
11.  Üzeri hafifçe kızardığında tartınız hazırdır.
12. Tartı oda sıcaklığında soğumaya bırakın, dilimleyip servis edin.
13.  Afiyet olsun.

zucchini-tarator-with-dill-recipe-lezzet.name: Zucchini Tarator With Dill Recipe

ingredients.item: Yoğurt ve labne karışımı (daha yoğun kıvam için)

instructions: 1. Kabakları yıkayıp, kabuklarını soyun ve küçük küpler halinde doğrayın.
2. Tuzlu suda veya buharda kabakları yumuşayana kadar haşlayın.
3.  (Aşırı yumuşamamasına dikkat edin, hafif diri kalmalı.
4. )Haşlanan kabakları süzgeçte iyice süzün ve oda sıcaklığına gelmesini bekleyin.
5. Yoğurdu derin bir kaba alın, içine ezilmiş sarımsakları ekleyip karıştırın.
6. Kabakları yoğurtlu karışıma ekleyin.
7.  Üzerine kıyılmış dereotu, zeytinyağı ve tuz ekleyip iyice karıştırın.
8. Üzerine zeytinyağı gezdirerek servis yapabilirsiniz.
9.  Afiyet olsun.

zucchini-tots.name: Zucchini Tots
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Spray a mini muffin tin with cooking spray.
Combine zucchini and carrot in a large bowl. Squeeze out excess water using a paper towel.

Mix bread crumbs, feta cheese, basil, egg, salt, pepper, and oregano into zucchini-carrot mixture. Scoop mixture with a mini ice cream scoop or two spoons and press into the prepared muffin cups with the back of a spoon.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown on top, 15 to 18 minutes.

zucchini-walnut-carrot-cake.name: Zucchini Walnut Carrot Cake
instructions: {'step': '1', 'instruction': 'Preheat the oven to 175 degrees C (177°C). Grease a 9x13-inch baking pan.'}
{'step': '2', 'instruction': 'Cream sugar and eggs together in a large bowl. Mix in applesauce and oil.'}

{'step': '3', 'instruction': 'Whisk whole wheat flour, all-purpose flour, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt together in a bowl; add to egg mixture. Fold in carrot, zucchini, and 1 cup walnuts. Spread in the prepared pan. Sprinkle with remaining walnuts.'}
{'step': '4', 'instruction': 'Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, about 40 minutes.'}

zucchini-with-cheese-and-almonds-lezzet.name: Zucchini With Cheese And Almonds
instructions: 1. Biberin çekirdeklerini temizleyip 1 yemek kaşığı zeytinyağında soteleyin.
2.  Badem ve fıstıkları tereyağı ile kavurun.
3.  Kabakları 1 cm kalınlığında dilimleyip iki tarafına da zeytinyağı sürün ve ızgarada önlü arkalı pişirin.
4.  Kabak dilimlerini tabağa alıp tuz, karabiber serpiştirin.
5.  Peyniri iri parçalar halinde üzerine yerleştirin.
6.  Biber, fıstık ve bademleri serpin.
7.  Nane yapraklarını ekleyerek servis yapın.

zucchini-with-cheese-in-a-bread-dish-lez.name: Zucchini With Cheese In A Bread Dish

ingredients.item: Yarım su bardağı ceviz içi (iri dövülmüş)

instructions: 1. Tost ekmeklerinin kenarlarını keserek çıkarın.
2.  Ekmeklerin iç kısımlarını merdane ile 2-3 mm kalınlığında olacak şekilde inceltin.
3.  Yuvarlak kurabiye kalıbı ile ekmeklerden yuvarlaklar çıkarın.
4.  Fırça ile arka ve ön kısımlarına zeytinyağı sürün.
5.  Ekmekleri muffin kalıplarına yerleştirip önceden ısıtılmış 170 derece fırında yaklaşık 5 dakika, pembeleşinceye kadar pişirin.
6.  Fırından çıkarıp ılınmaya bırakın.
7.  Diğer yanda tavaya zeytinyağı ekleyip ısıtın.
8.  Sarımsak ve kabağı ilave edip karıştırarak birkaç dakika pişirin.
9.  Tuz ve karabiber ekleyip ocaktan alın.
10.  Peynirleri ilave edip karıştırın.
11.  Ceviz içi, çörek otu, keten tohumu ve dereotunu da ekleyip karıştırın.
12.  Tost ekmekleri ile hazırladığınız ekmek çanaklarının içine birer kaşık peynirli kabaklı harçtan ekleyip servis yapın.

zucchini-with-cheese-in-the-oven-like-la.name: Zucchini With Cheese In The Oven Like Lasagna
zucchini-with-cheese-in-the-oven-like-la.original_name: Κολοκυθάκια με τυρί στο φούρνο σαν λαζάνια
instructions: Πλένουμε πολύ καλά τα κολοκύθια και τα στεγνώνουμε.

Τα κόβουμε στο μαντολίνο ή με ένα κοφτερό μαχαίρι σε λεπτές φέτες πάχους μικρότερου από 1/2 εκ. Τα πασπαλίζουμε με λίγο αλάτι και πιπέρι, τα ραντίζουμε με λίγο ελαιόλαδο και ανακατεύουμε να καρυκευτούν.
Κόβουμε σε κομμάτια το ζαμπόν.
Τρίβουμε τη φέτα σε ένα μπολ, προσθέτουμε τα αυγά, λίγο πιπέρι και, αν θέλουμε, λίγο άνηθο. Τα ανακατεύουμε πολύ καλά.
Αλείφουμε τη βάση και τα πλαϊνά τοιχώματα ενός μικρού πυρίμαχου σκεύους 20 x 30 εκ. με ελαιόλαδο.
Απλώνουμε μια στρώση κολοκύθι και καλύπτουμε με μείγμα φέτας και ψιλοκομμένο ζαμπόν.
Επαναλαμβάνουμε τις στρώσεις μέχρι να τελειώσουν τα υλικά, ολοκληρώνοντας με φέτες κολοκυθιού.
Ραντίζουμε το φαγητό με λίγες σταγόνες ελαιόλαδο και ψήνουμε σε καλά προθερμασμένο φούρνο στους 180°C, στον αέρα, για 30 λεπτά.
Πασπαλίζουμε με τη γραβιέρα όλη την επιφάνεια και ψήνουμε για 10 λεπτά επιπλέον, να λιώσει το τυρί και να ροδίσει ελαφρά.
Αφήνουμε το φαγητό να σταθεί για 10 λεπτά εκτός φούρνου και μετά το κόβουμε σε κομμάτια.
Αφαιρούμε το πρώτο κομμάτι στη γωνία και βάζουμε στη θέση του μια φέτα ψωμί. Την αφήνουμε να τραβήξει όλη την υγρασία των υλικών και στη συνέχεια την αφαιρούμε και σερβίρουμε.

zucchini-with-crispy-rice-and-lime.name: Zucchini With Crispy Rice And Lime
instructions: Whisk 3 Tbsp. fresh lime juice, 1 Tbsp. chili crisp, 1 Tbsp. fish sauce, 1 Tbsp. soy sauce, and 2 tsp. sugar in a large shallow bowl to combine. Set dressing aside.

Spread 2 cups chilled day-old cooked white rice out on a rimmed baking sheet, breaking up any clumps with your hands. Sprinkle with 2 Tbsp. rice flour and gently toss until rice is well coated and no flour remains on baking sheet.

Heat ¼ cup vegetable oil in a medium Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high. Add rice; reserve baking sheet. Gently toss with a heatproof rubber spatula to coat rice with oil and cook, tossing occasionally and breaking up any clumps of rice with spatula, until crisp and golden, 10–12 minutes. Transfer crispy rice to reserved baking sheet and spread out into an even layer.

Heat remaining 2 Tbsp. vegetable oil in same pot over medium-high. Add as much of 3 zucchini, quartered lengthwise, halved crosswise, as will fit in an even layer, arranging cut side down. Cook, undisturbed, until well browned underneath, about 2 minutes. Toss, then add remaining zucchini (cooking will have shrunk them slightly, making more space; it’s okay if they don’t all fit in a single layer). Cook, turning occasionally with tongs and transferring pieces to bowl with reserved dressing as they are done, until deep golden brown on cut sides, 3–4 minutes.
Add ½ small red onion, thinly sliced, and crispy rice to bowl with dressing and zucchini and toss to coat. Taste and season with kosher salt. Top with basil leaves and mint leaves.

zucchini-with-minced-meat-and-bechamel-w.name: Zucchini With Minced Meat And Béchamel With Yogurt
zucchini-with-minced-meat-and-bechamel-w.original_name: Κολοκυθάκια με κιμά και μπεσαμέλ με γιαούρτι

ingredients.item: 50 grγραβιέρα τριμμένη ή άλλο κίτρινο τυρί που λιώνει
50 grγραβιέρα τριμμένη ή άλλο κίτρινο τυρί που λιώνει

instructions: Πλένουμε τα κολοκύθια και χωρίς να αφαιρέσουμε το κοτσάνι τους τα κόβουμε κατά μήκος στη μέση και χαράζουμε σταυρωτά την επιφάνειά τους για να ψηθούν σωστά και γρήγορα στην καρδιά τους. Εναλλακτικά, αν έχουν πολλούς σπόρους, μπορούμε με ένα κουτάλι να τους αφαιρέσουμε.
Τα αραδιάζουμε σε ταψί στρωμένο με αντικολλητικό χαρτί, τα ραντίζουμε με λίγο ελαιόλαδο και τα πασπαλίζουμε με λίγο αλάτι και πιπέρι.

Ψήνουμε τα κολοκύθια στους 200°C, στον αέρα, στη μεσαία σχάρα, για περίπου 25 λεπτά, μέχρι να μαλακώσουν. Μόλις τα βγάλουμε από το φούρνο, πιέζουμε με ένα κουτάλι την ψίχα ώστε να ανοίξουμε μια θήκη για τη γέμιση.
Ζεσταίνουμε σε μια μικρή κατσαρόλα το ελαιόλαδο και σοτάρουμε τον κιμά σε δυνατή φωτιά μέχρι να ροδίσει ομοιόμορφα.
Προσθέτουμε το κρεμμύδι και το σκόρδο και συνεχίζουμε το σοτάρισμα για 3–4 λεπτά ανακατεύοντας. Σβήνουμε με το κονιάκ.
Ρίχνουμε το καρότο, την ντομάτα, αλάτι και πιπέρι και ανακατεύουμε.
Σκεπάζουμε το σκεύος με το καπάκι του, χαμηλώνουμε την ένταση της εστίας και αφήνουμε το μείγμα σε μέτρια φωτιά για 20 λεπτά, μέχρι να ψηθεί ο κιμάς και να πιει όλα τα υγρά του.
Προς το τέλος του μαγειρέματος αρωματίζουμε για 5 λεπτά με τη δάφνη και την κανέλα.
Αποσύρουμε τη γέμιση από τη φωτιά και ενσωματώνουμε το κεφαλοτύρι ανακατεύοντας.
Αναμειγνύουμε σε ένα μπολ το γιαούρτι με το αυγό.
Πασπαλίζουμε με λίγο μοσχοκάρυδο και ελάχιστο αλάτι και πιπέρι.
Μοιράζουμε στα ψημένα κολοκύθια τη στεγνή γέμιση του κιμά και καλύπτουμε με την κρέμα γιαουρτιού.
Πασπαλίζουμε με την τριμμένη γραβιέρα και ψήνουμε το φαγητό στο φούρνο, στους 200°C, στον αέρα, στη μεσαία σχάρα, για 15 λεπτά, μέχρι να λιώσει το τυρί σχηματίζοντας μια ελαφριά κρούστα.

zucchini-with-parmesan-and-curry-mayonna.name: Zucchini With Parmesan And Curry Mayonnaise
zucchini-with-parmesan-and-curry-mayonna.original_name: Curgete com parmesão e maionese de caril
instructions: Corte a curgete em palitos finos de 10 cm e reserve. Coloque o queijo parmesão numa tigela, junte os restantes ingredientes e envolva tudo muito bem.
Passe os palitos de curgete pelo preparado anterior, de modo a ficarem panados. Disponha-os num tabuleiro forrado com papel vegetal e leve ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºc, por cerca de 20 minutos.
Prepare o molho: coloque a maionese numa taça, junte o caril e o tabasco e envolva bem. Sirva, passando os palitos de curgete pelo molho.

zucchini-with-pork-recipe-comedera.name: Zucchini With Pork Recipe

ingredients.item: 12 onzas de lomo de puerco en trocitos
2 tazas de calabacitas  (cortadas en cubos medianos)
½ taza de puré de tomate  (machacado )

instructions: En una olla a fuego medio, cocina la carne de puerco con 1 taza de agua durante 10 minutos.
Cocina con la tapa y reserva el caldo de la cocción.
Agrega el aceite a la carne. Mezcla continuamente hasta dorar, aproximadamente 6 minutos.
Agrega la cebolla, el ajo, el chile serrano, las calabacitas y el elote. Mezcla y cocina durante 3-4 minutos.
Agrega el puré de tomate y ½ taza de agua de cocción del cerdo.
Sazona con orégano, comino, sal y pimienta.
Deja hervir, tapa la olla y deja cocinar a fuego medio durante 8 minutos o hasta que los vegetales estén de la consistencia que te guste.
Sirve caliente y acompáñalo con lo que gustes.

zucchini-with-potatoes-and-thyme.name: Zucchini With Potatoes And Thyme

ingredients.item: Sea salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Heat 3 Tbsp. oil in a large heavy skillet over medium-high heat. Combine potatoes and garlic in a large bowl; season with salt and pepper. Add potato mixture to hot skillet. Without stirring or moving pan, cook potatoes until light golden brown on one side (this will prevent sticking), 3–4 minutes. Using a spatula, toss potatoes and cook until light golden brown on all sides and cooked through, 8–10 minutes longer.
Add thyme; toss to coat. Transfer potatoes to a large bowl; set aside.

Heat remaining 1 Tbsp. oil in same skillet. Add zucchini and season with salt and pepper. Cook until light golden brown and tender but not mushy, 5–6 minutes. Add to bowl with potatoes and toss to combine. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Serve warm or at room temperature.

zucchini-wrapped-meatballs-lezzet.name: Zucchini Wrapped Meatballs
instructions: 1. Kabağı kaynar suda 5 dakika haşlayın ve uzun dilimler şeklinde kesin.
2.  Köfte için gerekli olan bütün malzemeyi derin bir kaseye alarak iyice yoğurup buzdolabında yarım saat dinlendirin.
3.  Küçük parçalar kopartıp top şekli verin.
4.  İki kabağı artı şekli olacak şekilde tezgaha koyun ve ortasına köfteyi yerleştirip kabak dilimlerini iki taraftan kapatın.
5.  Üzerlerine kürdan saplayıp fırın tepsisine dizin.
6.  Önceden ısıtılmış fırında 175 derecede 20 dakika pişirip üzerlerine kaşar dilimlerini koyun.
7.  Peynirler eriyip kızarana kadar 190 derecede yaklaşık 10 dakika daha pişirdikten sonra servis yapın.

zucchini-sayan-recipe-lezzet.name: Zucchini Şayan Recipe

ingredients.item: Mayonez kullanmak istemezseniz sadece süzme yoğurtla daha hafif bir versiyon hazırlayabilirsiniz.
Yoğurda bir miktar labne ekleyerek daha kremamsı bir kıvam elde edebilirsiniz.
Ceviz yerine fındık veya badem kullanabilirsiniz.
Nar ekşisi veya birkaç damla limon suyu ekleyerek hafif ekşi bir aroma katabilirsiniz.
üzerine ince kıyılmış dereotu veya maydanoz serperek ferah bir tat elde edebilirsiniz.
Acı sevenler için pul biber miktarı artırılabilir veya isot tercih edilebilir.

instructions: 1. Kabakları yıkayıp kabuklarını soyun.
2.  Rendenin iri tarafıyla rendeleyin.
3. Geniş bir tavaya zeytinyağını alın.
4.  Rendelenmiş kabakları ekleyin ve orta ateşte suyunu salıp tamamen çekene kadar kavurun.
5.  Hafif diri kalmalı, çok ezilmemeli.
6. Ocaktan aldıktan sonra tamamen soğumaya bırakın.
7. Bir kasede süzme yoğurt, ezilmiş sarımsak, mayonez ve tuzu pürüzsüz olana kadar karıştırın.
8. Yoğurtlu karışımı geniş bir servis tabağına yayın.
9.  Kaşıkla kenarlara doğru bastırarak ortası hafif çukur olacak şekilde düzeltin.
10. Soğuyan kabakları yoğurdun tam orta kısmına yerleştirin.
11.  Kenarlarda yoğurt halkası kalacak şekilde ortayı doldurun.
12. Küçük bir tavada zeytinyağını ısıtın.
13.  Orta dövülmüş cevizleri ekleyip hafif renk alana kadar çevirin.
14. Ardından kuru nane ve pul biberi ilave edip birkaç saniye karıştırın.
15. Cevizli karışımı kabakların tam üzerine yerleştirin.
16. Dilerseniz ince kıyılmış dereotu serperek görseldeki gibi taze bir görünüm elde edebilirsiniz.
17.  Afiyet olsun.

zucchini-potato-and-carrot-puree-for-bab.name: Zucchini, Potato And Carrot Puree For Babies
zucchini-potato-and-carrot-puree-for-bab.original_name: Puré de calabacín, patata y zanahoria para bebés
instructions: Lava y pela las zanahorias y la patata. Lava el calabacín y quita los extremos. Corta todos los vegetales en trozos pequeños y uniformes para facilitar la cocción y la preparación del puré.

Ponemos las patatas y las zanahorias en un cazo, las cubrimos con agua, lo ponemos a fuego lento, añadimos el calabacín y lo dejamos al fuego unos 15 minutos más hasta que la verdura esté cocida. Triturar todo con una batidora y pasarlo por el pasapurés. Para enriquecer el sabor y aumentar la cantidad de grasas saludables, puedes agregar una cucharadita de aceite de oliva virgen extra al puré.

zucchini-potato-and-fontina-pizzettas.name: Zucchini, Potato, And Fontina Pizzettas
instructions: Whisk yeast, sugar, and 3 Tbsp. warm water in a large bowl. Let sit until surface is foamy, about 5 minutes. Add 1¼ cups room-temperature water, then add 1 cup flour, whisking until smooth (mixture should be the consistency of pancake batter). Add 2½ cups flour and 2 tsp. kosher salt and mix with a wooden spoon until a shaggy dough forms.

Turn out dough onto a lightly floured surface and knead with your hands, adding more flour as needed to prevent it from sticking, until dough is smooth and supple, 5–10 minutes (it will be very soft). Transfer to a large oiled bowl and cover with plastic wrap. Let rise in a warm, draft-free spot until doubled in size, 1–1½ hours.

Divide dough into 4 equal pieces and form into balls. Place on an oiled rimmed baking sheet and cover with plastic wrap; let rise in a warm, draft-free spot until balls of dough are nearly doubled in size, 40–50 minutes.

Meanwhile, place potato slices in a colander and rinse with cold water. Drain, season with kosher salt, and let sit, tossing occasionally, until softened, 10–15 minutes. Transfer to a bowl and toss with onion, zucchini, and 2 Tbsp. oil; set aside.
Preheat oven to 450°. Working with 1 ball of dough at a time and keeping remaining dough covered while you work, roll out dough on a lightly floured surface into 10" rounds.

Heat a dry large cast-iron skillet over medium. Pour 1 Tbsp. oil into skillet and cook a dough round until bottom is golden brown and top looks dry, about 1 minute. Flip and cook just until bottom is lightly golden, about 1 minute. Transfer to a rimmed baking sheet and repeat with remaining 3 Tbsp. oil and rounds of dough (you should be able to fit two pizzettas per baking sheet if you overlap them slightly).

Top pizzettas with Fontina cheese and reserved potato mixture; season with kosher salt. Bake, rotating baking sheets once top to bottom and back to front, until crusts are golden brown and crisp and cheese is bubbling, 10–15 minutes. Remove pizzettas from oven, season with sea salt and pepper, and drizzle with oil.

zucchini-carrot-banana-whole-wheat-bread.name: Zucchini-carrot-banana Whole Wheat Bread
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a loaf pan.
Mash banana in a large bowl; whisk in eggs, sugar, honey, oil, and vanilla extract.
Combine whole wheat flour, all-purpose flour, cinnamon, baking soda, baking powder, and salt in a separate bowl; stir into banana mixture until batter is moistened.
Stir zucchini, carrot, and chocolate chips into batter until evenly distributed; pour into the prepared pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until a knife inserted into center comes out clean, 50 to 60 minutes.

zucchini-herb-fritters-with-garlic-yogur.name: Zucchini-herb Fritters With Garlic Yogurt

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Mix yogurt, mint, lemon juice, oil, honey, and garlic in a small bowl; season with salt and pepper. Cover; chill.

Grate zucchini, potato, and onion on the large holes of a box grater. Transfer to a mesh sieve set over a bowl and toss with 2 tsp. salt. Let vegetables sit until they release their liquid, 30−40 minutes.

Mix eggs, garlic, cumin, 3 Tbsp. parsley, and 2 Tbsp. mint in a medium bowl; season with salt and pepper. Gather up half of zucchini mixture in a kitchen towel; squeeze out excess liquid. Add to bowl with egg mixture and repeat with remaining zucchini mixture. Sprinkle flour and baking powder over; mix gently.

Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Working in batches, spoon scoops of mixture into skillet, flattening gently with a spatula. Cook until golden brown and crisp, about 3 minutes per side. Transfer to a wire rack; season with salt. Drizzle yogurt sauce with olive oil and top with more herbs; serve alongside warm fritters.

zucchini-lentil-fritters.name: Zucchini-lentil Fritters

ingredients.item: Kashmiri chile powder or  0.25 tsp. cayenne pepper

instructions: Whisk yogurt, lemon juice, and sugar in a small bowl to combine. Season with salt and whisk again to combine.
Do Ahead: Yogurt can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

Rinse lentils, then soak in 2 cups water at room temperature at least 1 hour and up to 12. Soaking the lentils for this long will make them super-plump and tender, which in turn makes them a lot easier to blend.

Meanwhile, trim ends of zucchini and cut crosswise into 3 pieces about 2" long. Cut each piece lengthwise into ¼"-thick planks. Stack a few planks and slice lengthwise into ¼"-thick matchsticks (about the size of a skinny french fry). Transfer zucchini to a colander set in a medium bowl. Add onion and 1 tsp. salt to colander and toss to combine. Let zucchini and onion sit until about 1 Tbsp. liquid has released and the vegetables look wilted and soft, 30 minutes–2 hours (to maximize your downtime, do this while the lentils are soaking). Gently pat dry with paper towels to remove any excess moisture. The less moisture in the veggies, the less soggy your fritters will be, so be sure not to skip this step.

Drain lentils and transfer to a food processor. Add chile powder, turmeric, and ¾ tsp. salt. Pulse, scraping down sides, until a purée forms. Transfer to a medium bowl and add zucchini and onion mixture, parsley, and lemon zest. Toss well with a rubber spatula to combine (it will look like too much vegetables for the lentils, but that’s just what you want).

Heat ghee in a 10" cast-iron skillet over medium-high until a small amount of batter added to the fat excitedly sizzles and sputters. Carefully drop ¼ cup batter into ghee, then flatten to a pancake with the back of a large metal spoon dipped into the hot ghee to prevent sticking. Repeat 3 times for a total of 4 fritters. Fry until deep golden brown on one side (look for the color of a well-fried falafel), about 3 minutes. Turn with a slotted spatula or large spoon and continue to fry until deep golden brown on the second side, about 3 minutes more. Transfer fritters to a wire rack set in a paper towel-lined baking sheet to drain. Season immediately with salt. Repeat with remaining batter (you should have 8–10 fritters).
Transfer fritters to a platter. Serve hot with lemony yogurt alongside.

zucchini-pecan-cake-with-cream-cheese-fr.name: Zucchini-pecan Cake With Cream Cheese Frosting

ingredients.item: 8-ounce package philadelphia-brand cream cheese (do not use reduced-fat or fat-free)

instructions: Position rack in center of oven and preheat to 177°C. Line 9-inch-diameter cake pan with 2-inch-high sides with parchment paper. Coat parchment paper with nonstick spray.

Whisk flour, baking powder, coarse salt, cinnamon, ginger, and nutmeg in medium bowl to blend well. Whisk oil, sugar, eggs, and vanilla in large bowl to blend well; fold in flour mixture, then grated zucchini and pecans. Transfer cake batter to prepared pan.

Bake cake until tester inserted into center comes out clean, about 45 minutes. Cool cake completely in pan on rack, about 1 hour. Cut around sides of pan to loosen. Turn cake out onto platter; peel off parchment paper.

Using electric mixer, beat cream cheese and butter in medium bowl until blended. Beat in sugar, vanilla, and cinnamon. Spread frosting thickly over top of cake. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.
Cut cake into wedges and serve.

zucchini-tomato-side-dish.name: Zucchini-tomato Side Dish

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat and cook onion until soft and translucent, 3 to 5 minutes. Add garlic and cook for 30 seconds. Add zucchini and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Stir in tomato paste and tomato. Season with herbes de Provence, salt, black pepper, and sugar. Stir in basil and serve.

zuppa-di-pesce-e-frutti-di-mare-mediterr.name: Zuppa Di Pesce E Frutti Di Mare (mediterranean Seafood Soup)

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Cut cod into pieces, reserving any scraps. Peel and devein prawns, reserving shells and any other scraps.

Place cod scraps and prawn scraps, quartered onion, carrot, celery, salt, and pepper in a large saucepan; cover with water. Bring to a boil; reduce heat and simmer until fish stock is fragrant, 15 to 20 minutes.
Strain and reserve fish stock.
Heat olive oil in a saucepan over medium heat; cook and stir sliced onion, red chile pepper, and minced garlic until softened, 5 to 10 minutes.

Pour in wine; cook for 5 minutes. Add tomatoes; bring to a boil. Add cod, prawns, clams, and mussels; pour in 1 cup fish stock. Simmer until fish is cooked through and clams and mussels have opened, 15 to 20 minutes.
Toast bread in a toaster. Rub garlic halves on to 1 side of toasted bread.
Place a piece of toasted bread in the bottom of each serving bowl. Ladle soup over toasted bread and top with parsley.

zuppa-di-pesce-fra-di-avolo.name: Zuppa Di Pesce Fra Di Avolo
instructions: Heat 3 tablespoons olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat; cook and stir sea scallops, shrimp, and calamari rings in the hot oil until scallops and calamari are opaque and shrimp are pink, about 5 minutes.
Bring a separate pot of water to a boil and add mussels and littleneck clams to the boiling water; cook until shells have opened, about 3 minutes.
Remove shellfish and rinse with hot water.
Pour crushed tomatoes, water, 2 cans chopped clams, 1/4 cup olive oil, onion, red pepper flakes, garlic, oregano, parsley, and salt into a large pot and bring to a boil.
Stir cooked scallops, shrimp, calamari, mussels in shells, and littleneck clams in shells into tomato mixture. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 1 hour.

About 10 minutes before serving, bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil; cook the linguine at a boil until tender yet firm to the bite, about 10 minutes; drain and rinse pasta in hot water to prevent sticking.
Serve seafood and sauce over pasta.

zuppa-toscana.name: Zuppa Toscana

ingredients.item: Homemade chicken or vegetable stock or store-bought low-sodium broth

ingredients.prep: stemmed and cut or torn into roughly 2-inch pieces

zwetschgen-kuchen-plum-tart-with-streuse.name: Zwetschgen-kuchen (plum Tart With Streusel)
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C. Grease and line a 10-inch springform cake pan with parchment paper.

Put all the ingredients for the crust, except the egg yolk, into a bowl. With your hands, mix and work the ingredients together until the dough becomes smooth and pliable. On a floured surface, roll out the dough slightly larger than the diameter of the pan. Transfer the dough to the pan—there should be a rim of about 1 inch around the sides. Brush the inside of the crust with egg yolk.
Prepare the plums. Wash them, halve them, and remove the pits. Then, from the cut side, cut them again about halfway through. Arrange the plums on the crust.

For the streusel, add the remaining topping ingredients to a separate bowl and mix, working it with your hands until it holds together in big chunks. Spread the chunks randomly over the plums, leaving part of the plums uncovered.
Bake for about 70 minutes. Keep an eye on the color of the streusel and don't let it get too dark.
This cake tastes great warm, and whipped cream or vanilla ice cream are good accompaniments. It keeps well for several days, stored in an airtight container.

zwetschgendatschi-german-plum-sheet-cake.name: Zwetschgendatschi (german Plum Sheet Cake)

ingredients.prep: room temperature and cut into chunks

instructions: Combine flour and baking powder in a large bowl. Mix in 1 cup sugar, vanilla sugar, and salt. Add 1 1/3 cups butter and eggs. Knead everything into a smooth dough. Shape dough into a ball, press flat, cover, and chill in the refrigerator 1 hour to overnight.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a baking sheet with butter.
Cut halved plums in half again, without cutting all the way through, so they fan out.
Roll pastry dough out on a lightly floured work surface. Line the bottom and sides of the prepared baking sheet with dough. Mix 2 tablespoons sugar and cinnamon together in a bowl.
Arrange plums side by side on the pastry dough; very small plums should overlap. Dot plums with 2 tablespoons butter and sprinkle with cinnamon sugar and almonds.
Bake in the preheated oven until pastry crust is lightly browned, 30 to 40 minutes. Remove from oven. Allow plum cake to cool, then cut into squares. Serve lukewarm or at room temperature.

ze-do-pipo-fish-fillets-teleculinaria.name: Zé Do Pipo Fish Fillets
ze-do-pipo-fish-fillets-teleculinaria.original_name: Filetes de pescada à Zé do Pipo
instructions: Corte os filetes ao meio e tempere-os com sal, pimenta e o sumo de limão. Descasque as cebolas e os alhos, corte as cebolas em meias-luas finas e pique os alhos. Coloque num tacho o azeite, a folha de louro, a cebola e o alho, leve ao lume e deixe refogar até a cebola ficar macia. Retire e reserve.

Prepare o puré: descasque as batatas, corte-as ao meio e coza-as em água temperada com sal. Escorra-as e reduza-as a puré. Junte a manteiga, mexa, adicione depois o leite e os ovos batidos, tempere com noz-moscada e mexa bem.
Passe os filetes por farinha e depois pelo ovos batidos. Frite-os em óleo quente abundante e escorra-os sobre papel absorvente.

Num tabuleiro de forno, coloque a cebolada e, por cima, os filetes e os pickles picados. Cubra os filetes com a maionese. Disponha o puré à volta, utilizando um saco de pasteleiro com boquilha frisada.
Leve o tabuleiro ao forno, pré-aquecido a 180ºC, até a superfície ficar gratinada. Polvilhe com salsa picada, decore com azeitonas pretas e sirva de seguida.
